revenue_streams.name: SaaS Subscriptions
revenue_streams.description: Core recurring revenue from tiered subscription plans. Basic ($29/mo), Pro ($49/mo), and Enterprise ($199/mo) plans with increasing feature access, document limits, and AI query allowances.
revenue_streams.notes: Primary revenue driver. Focus on Pro tier as sweet spot for pro se litigants.

revenue_streams.name: API Access
revenue_streams.description: RESTful API for legal document generation, case law research, and filing automation. Sold to legal tech companies, law firms, and legal aid organizations on usage-based pricing.
revenue_streams.notes: High-margin, scalable. Requires robust API infrastructure and documentation.

revenue_streams.name: Filing Template Marketplace
revenue_streams.description: Premium court-ready document templates for specific jurisdictions and case types. Templates include motions, responses, discovery requests, and trial prep documents. One-time purchase or subscription bundle.
revenue_streams.notes: Low cost to produce, high perceived value. Jurisdiction-specific templates are the moat.

revenue_streams.name: Legal Strategy Consulting
revenue_streams.description: One-on-one video consultations with legal strategists (not legal advice) for case review, document review, and strategy sessions. Positioned as 'legal coaching' to stay within regulatory bounds.
revenue_streams.notes: Requires vetted consultants. Start with founder-led sessions, scale with contractors.

revenue_streams.name: White-Label Platform
revenue_streams.description: Licensed version of LitigationOS for legal aid organizations, law school clinics, and court self-help centers. Custom branding, jurisdiction-specific configuration, and bulk user management.
revenue_streams.notes: Long sales cycle but high contract value. Target legal aid orgs with grant funding.

revenue_streams.name: AI Document Review Credits
revenue_streams.description: Pay-per-use AI analysis of legal documents. Upload opposing counsel filings, contracts, or court orders for AI-powered analysis, weakness identification, and response suggestions.
revenue_streams.notes: Strong upsell from free tier. AI costs per doc ~$0.15, high margin at scale.

revenue_streams.name: Court Calendar & Deadline SaaS
revenue_streams.description: Standalone deadline tracking and court calendar management tool. Integrates with state court systems, calculates response deadlines, and sends multi-channel reminders (email, SMS, push).
revenue_streams.notes: Entry-level product to capture users early in their case. Gateway to full platform.

revenue_streams.name: Educational Course Content
revenue_streams.description: Self-paced video courses on pro se litigation, family court procedures, legal writing, and case strategy. Sold individually or bundled with platform subscriptions.
revenue_streams.notes: Content creation upfront cost, then pure margin. Builds authority and trust.

revenue_streams.name: Affiliate & Referral Revenue
revenue_streams.description: Commission revenue from referring users to complementary services: process servers, court reporters, mediators, notary services, legal insurance, and background check providers.
revenue_streams.notes: Pure margin revenue. Requires user volume to be attractive to partners.

revenue_streams.name: Data & Analytics Licensing
revenue_streams.description: Anonymized, aggregated legal data insights sold to legal researchers, policy organizations, and academic institutions. Court outcome predictions, filing trend analysis, and jurisdiction benchmarking.
revenue_streams.notes: Requires significant data volume. Privacy-first approach mandatory. GDPR/CCPA compliant.

summary.growth_strategy: Land with free tier and templates, expand with AI credits and Pro subscriptions, enterprise with white-label
